text:
NEON GENESIS EVANGELION DECADE is an album released to commemorate the 10th anniversary of the date that the anime TV series began airing. It was published by via its label STARCHILD with catalog number KICA-718 on 26 October 2005 for 2,800 yen (tax included). http://vgmdb.net/album/30192 

The album peaked at number 24 in the Oricon charts, making 90 appearances on the chart. In addition to the music used in the anime, the theme song "Zankoku na Tenshi no These" was also newly recorded and sung by Yoko Takahashi.
